function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by OCR-migrating all 8 requested finance records into schema-shaped YAML frontmatter while preserving each original markdown body, then removed the completed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed root and nested AGENTS rules, inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox-processing, OCR, migration, and finance schema workflows, preserved original note bodies exactly under new frontmatter, and deleted the inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked for OCR workflow on eight finance records. Each listed record was read and found to contain all required visible fields from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, allowing compliant migration by adding YAML frontmatter in place while preserving the original body exactly as required by 99_system/workflows/migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md and ocr-records.md. After all eight updates were completed, the inbox file was deleted per process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
